seo.title: Zod Validation
seo.description: Zod schema validation patterns for runtime type checking, form validation, and API response parsing

header.title: Validation & Type Safety with Zod
header.description: Deterministic validation layer ensuring that all data entering the system conforms to the defined architectural contracts.

benefit_text: Zod allows combining runtime validation with TypeScript typing, creating a single source of truth for forms and API data.

schemas.label: Zod Schemas:
schemas.text: Located in the <one>schema</one> folder. Files are named following the <two>[name].schema.ts</two> pattern. Schemas are named in uppercase (e.g., <three>ENTITY_SCHEMA</three>).

types.label: Types & Interfaces:
types.text: Located in the <one>types</one> folder. Types inferred from schemas are named with a <two>T</two> prefix (e.g., <three>TEntitySchema</three>). All form field enums are stored in <four>ENUM_FORM_...</four> objects.

schema.title: Schema Definition
schema.description: Creating a Zod object using <one>i18nKey</one> for localized error messages.

types.title: Type Inference
types.description: Using <one>z.infer</one> to automatically generate TypeScript types from the schema.
